title: Abandon
lyrics: Feel the water raising your heart, make it a little fusion. Feel the tires and abandonment of your health. Breathe in your health, breathe and there's no running from where you've left you. You're abandoned in any way, shape or form, the love you want. You're abandoned in all you hope for, dream for, there's a war at your door. You always hate me down in the line. Hate me down to my desire. Stitching me out to my revenge. I have no friends in the end. You abandoned you, all of your hopes and dreams. You abandoned all you wanted to. Feel inside the hell that is this when it took me to find a home. Get a little closer to me, I think I'll take it from you. I'll take away all the sins that made you be you. Abandoned in lies to find a meaning. I don't know if we can ever be free. Been in the thought that you're not controlled. You're in a moon zone, you're just a pawnhole. Get control. Hope is got you. Get control. Get control of us. You're the dreamer. Hope's all you're screaming. But you're alone. You abandoned you. From any hope that you can ever find. Abandoned in the dreams of you. You abandoned us. It's all the loss and time and dust that we've left here. There's no trust. We're dead. Dead. Abandoned in the hopelessness of our desire to be loved in degrees. The enemy seats on our souls. Abandoned by hope. I see through the eyes of hell. I see through the eyes of the things you meant to do well. I see all of your dusted lies. Abandoned in the hope of no surprise.

lyricsSegments.text: Feel the water raising your heart, make it a little fusion.
Feel the tires and abandonment of your health.
Breathe in your health, breathe and there's no running from where you've left you.
You're abandoned in any way, shape or form, the love you want.
You're abandoned in all you hope for, dream for, there's a war at your door.
You always hate me down in the line.
Hate me down to my desire.
Stitching me out to my revenge.
I have no friends in the end.
You abandoned you, all of your hopes and dreams.
You abandoned all you wanted to.
Feel inside the hell that is this when it took me to find a home.
Get a little closer to me, I think I'll take it from you.
I'll take away all the sins that made you be you.
Abandoned in lies to find a meaning.
I don't know if we can ever be free.
Been in the thought that you're not controlled.
You're in a moon zone, you're just a pawnhole.
Get control.
Hope is got you.
Get control.
Get control of us.
You're the dreamer.
Hope's all you're screaming.
But you're alone.
You abandoned you.
From any hope that you can ever find.
Abandoned in the dreams of you.
You abandoned us.
It's all the loss and time and dust that we've left here.
There's no trust.
We're dead.
Dead.
Abandoned in the hopelessness of our desire to be loved in degrees.
The enemy seats on our souls.
Abandoned by hope.
I see through the eyes of hell.
I see through the eyes of the things you meant to do well.
I see all of your dusted lies.
Abandoned in the hope of no surprise.
